content.explanation:
**Wanted — Past Tense में चाहना:**

"Wanted" = चाहता था / चाहती थी (past tense of want)
सभी subjects के साथ same: I/He/She/We/They → **wanted**

**Positive:**
Subject + **wanted** + to + base verb
Subject + **wanted** + noun

🇮🇳 मैं डॉक्टर बनना चाहता था।
🇬🇧 I **wanted** to become a doctor.

**Negative:**
Subject + **did not want** + to + base verb

**Question:**
**Did** + subject + **want** + to + verb?
rules: Wanted — same for ALL subjects (I/He/She/We/They + wanted)
Positive: I wanted to + verb / I wanted + noun
Negative: I did not want / He did not want (did + not + want)
Question: Did you want...? / Did she want...?
Difference: want (present desire) vs wanted (past desire)
content.memoryTrick:
**"WANTED = Past WANT"** — बस want का past version है। सबके साथ same: wanted.
Did के बाद हमेशा want (base form).

examples.hindi: मैं पहले पायलट बनना चाहता था।
examples.english: I wanted to become a pilot.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम वहाँ जाना चाहते थे?
examples.english: Did you want to go there?

examples.hindi: हम पहले यहाँ नहीं आना चाहते थे।
examples.english: We did not want to come here before.

examples.hindi: वह बचपन में खिलाड़ी बनना चाहती थी।
examples.english: She wanted to become a player in childhood.
They did not want an answer.

mistakes.why: Was + wanting = गलत। Simple "wanted" use करो
Did के बाद base verb (want, not wanted)

speakingTips: अपनी childhood dreams बताओ: "When I was young, I wanted to..."
Past plans: "I wanted to call you but..."
Interview में: "I wanted to join your company because..."

vocabulary.example: I previously wanted to study abroad.
In childhood, I wanted to be a cricketer.
My goal was to get a promotion.
Her aim was to travel the world.
His ambition was to start a business.

practice.hindi: मैं कल जाना चाहता था।
practice.english: I wanted to go yesterday.
alternatives: i wanted to leave yesterday.

practice.hindi: वह डॉक्टर बनना चाहती थी।
practice.english: She wanted to become a doctor.
alternatives: she wanted to be a doctor.

practice.hindi: मैं तुमसे मिलना चाहता था।
practice.english: I wanted to meet you.
alternatives: i wanted to see you.

practice.hindi: वह कुछ कहना चाहता था।
practice.english: He wanted to say something.
alternatives: he wanted to speak.

practice.hindi: हम बाहर जाना चाहते थे।
practice.english: We wanted to go out.
alternatives: we wanted to go outside.

practice.hindi: क्या वह आना चाहती थी?
practice.english: Did she want to come?
alternatives: did she want to visit?

practice.hindi: मुझे और पैसे चाहिए थे।
practice.english: I wanted more money.
alternatives: i needed more money.

practice.hindi: वह पहले पायलट बनना चाहता था।
practice.english: He wanted to become a pilot before.
alternatives: he used to want to be a pilot.

practice.hindi: मैं तुमसे बात करना चाहता था।
practice.english: I wanted to talk to you.
alternatives: i wanted to speak with you.

practice.hindi: वे विदेश जाना चाहते थे।
practice.english: They wanted to go abroad.
alternatives: they wanted to travel overseas.

practice.hindi: मैं उसकी मदद करना चाहता था।
practice.english: I wanted to help him.
alternatives: i wanted to assist him.

practice.hindi: उसे माफ़ी माँगनी थी।
practice.english: He wanted to apologize.
alternatives: he wanted to say sorry.

practice.hindi: वह कुछ अलग करना चाहती थी।
practice.english: She wanted to do something different.
alternatives: she wanted to try something new.

practice.hindi: मुझे किसी से बात नहीं करनी थी।
practice.english: I did not want to talk to anyone.
alternatives: i didn't want to talk to anyone.

practice.hindi: बच्चे खेलना चाहते थे।
practice.english: The children wanted to play.
alternatives: the kids wanted to play.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम खाना खाना चाहते थे?
practice.english: Did you want to eat?
alternatives: did you want to have food?

practice.hindi: उसने नई जगह रहना चाहा था।
practice.english: She wanted to live in a new place.
alternatives: she wanted to move somewhere new.

practice.hindi: मैं उस मीटिंग में जाना चाहता था।
practice.english: I wanted to attend that meeting.
alternatives: i wanted to go to that meeting.

practice.hindi: वे एक नया काम शुरू करना चाहते थे।
practice.english: They wanted to start a new business.
alternatives: they wanted to begin a new venture.

practice.hindi: मुझे उससे कुछ पूछना था।
practice.english: I wanted to ask him something.
alternatives: i wanted to question him.

practice.hindi: वह अपना घर खरीदना चाहता था।
practice.english: He wanted to buy his own house.
alternatives: he wanted to own a house.

practice.hindi: हम पहले उसे बताना चाहते थे।
practice.english: We wanted to tell him first.
alternatives: we wanted to inform him first.

practice.hindi: वह सफ़र पर जाना चाहती थी।
practice.english: She wanted to go on a trip.
alternatives: she wanted to travel.
practice.hint: wanted to + go on a trip

practice.hindi: क्या आप कुछ और जानना चाहते थे?
practice.english: Did you want to know anything else?
alternatives: did you want more information?

practice.hindi: वे अपनी गलती सुधारना चाहते थे।
practice.english: They wanted to correct their mistake.
alternatives: they wanted to fix their error.

practice.hindi: मैं तुम्हें surprise देना चाहता था।
practice.english: I wanted to surprise you.
alternatives: i wanted to give you a surprise.

practice.hindi: उसने पूरी बात सुनाना चाहा था।
practice.english: He wanted to tell the whole story.
alternatives: he wanted to narrate everything.
practice.hint: wanted to + tell the whole story

practice.hindi: मुझे उस party में जाना था।
practice.english: I wanted to go to that party.
alternatives: i wanted to attend that party.

practice.hindi: वह नई भाषा सीखना चाहती थी।
practice.english: She wanted to learn a new language.
alternatives: she wanted to study a new language.

practice.hindi: मैं उस समय आराम करना चाहता था।
practice.english: I wanted to rest at that time.
alternatives: i wanted to relax then.
